message:
✨ Migrate ~88 inline buttons to shared Button component (#1953)

Replace hardcoded inline button patterns with the shared Button
component across 38 files. Covers primary, secondary, danger, ghost,
and accent variants.

Categories migrated:
- Card buttons (kubectl, alerts, OPA, namespace quotas, helm, etc.)
- Layout buttons (sidebar customizer, navbar, version banner)
- Dashboard buttons (cards, modals, discover placeholder)
- Drilldown buttons (pod, cluster detail modal)
- Settings buttons (token usage, predictions, local clusters, agent)
- Modal buttons (confirm dialogs, OPA modals, cluster selection)
- Feedback/rewards buttons (feature requests, LinkedIn share)
- Mission buttons (resolution panels, cluster selection)

Buttons with complex conditional classes (ternary variant switching),
game-specific styling, or non-matching color schemes were skipped.

Also removes unused Loader2 import from NamespaceQuotas.tsx (replaced
by Button loading prop).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
